svg.title: SuiMesh heavy action trace
svg.desc: A high-impact action moves through a verifiable trace from user intent to audit event.

svg.text: The high-impact path keeps each step explicit: proposal, facts, decision, claim, receipt, and audit.

g.text: Every heavy action is linked by hashes and can be restored later.
